description:
**Milestone:** File Editor UI (Nice-to-Have)

Install CodeMirror 6 dependencies (@uiw/react-codemirror, @codemirror/lang-javascript, @codemirror/lang-typescript, @codemirror/lang-css, @codemirror/lang-json, @codemirror/lang-markdown, @codemirror/lang-python, @codemirror/theme-one-dark). Create code-editor.tsx component with syntax highlighting, configurable font family/size (persisted to app store), binary file detection (disable editing for images/archives/fonts). Create editor-tabs.tsx for multi-tab management with close, unsaved-changes indicator, drag-to-reorder. Implement auto-save with 1-second debounce writing to /api/fs/write. Wire file tree clicks to open tabs in editor.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/ui/package.json
- apps/ui/src/components/views/file-editor-view/code-editor.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/file-editor-view/editor-tabs.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/file-editor-view/use-file-editor-store.ts
- apps/ui/src/store/app-store.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Clicking a file in the tree opens it in a new tab
- [ ] Syntax highlighting works for .ts, .tsx, .js, .json, .md, .css, .py
- [ ] Auto-save writes changes to server after 1s debounce
- [ ] Unsaved changes indicator (dot) shows on modified tabs
- [ ] Binary files show warning instead of editor
- [ ] Font family and size settings persist across sessions
- [ ] npm run build passes

**Complexity:** large
title: CodeMirror Tabbed Editor + Auto-Save
